title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is an Nvidia-developed AI image generation model optimized for 4K and high-resolution image synthesis. The video demonstrates PiD as a free and open-source alternative for image generation, showcasing comparisons with other models and integration with ComfyUI workflows.
